docs.title: sr2silo.silo.LapisClient
docs.text: Client for interacting with the Lapis API.

docs.title: sr2silo.silo.Submission
docs.text: Submission-related utilities. Methods for generating placeholder FASTA files containing "NNN" sequences, and S3 links

docs.title: generate_placeholder_fasta(submission_ids) staticmethod
docs.text: Generates a placeholder FASTA file for each submission ID with "NNN" as the sequence.

docs.title: get_submission_ids_from_tsv(file_path) staticmethod
docs.text: Reads a TSV file and extracts submission IDs by parsing the "submissionId" column.

docs.title: sr2silo.silo.wrangle_for_transformer(input_dir, output_dir, fasta_file, insertions_file, metadata_file, database_config_fp)
docs.text:
Wrangle the sequences to the format required by the silo_input_transformer.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default input_dir Path

The directory containing the sequences to wrangle. aa_insertions.tsv, gene_*.fasta, metadata.json, nuc_main.fasta, nucleotide_insertions.tsv, reference_genomes.json, unaligned_main.fasta

required output_dir Path

The empty working and output directory to save intermediate files and results i.e. ndjson file.

required fasta_file Path

The FASTA file containing the unaligned nuclotide sequences.

required insertions_file Path

The tsv file containing the nucleotide insertions.

required metadata_file Path

The metadata json file containing the per sequencing run metadata, that is copied for each read_id in the output.

required database_config_fp Path

The database configuration file containing the schema for the metadata, has to match the metadata keys in the metadata.json file but the read_id key is not in the schema.

required

Returns:

Type Description dict[str, Path]

dict[str, Path]: A dictionary containing the paths to the files created during the wrangling process.

         metadata_fp: metadata.tsv
         database_config_new_fp: database_config.yaml
         reference_genomes_fp: reference_genomes.json
